narrative:
Jackson Townshp township has 773 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.1%, a modest Republican lean of 5.2 percentage points.
